title: Main Build Pipeline

phases.label: Generate Sub-Pages
phases.output: subPageFiles[] (HTML paths for skills, anti-patterns, tutorials)

phases.label: Bundle Static Site (Bun)
phases.detail: Bun.build({ entrypoints: [index.html, cheatsheet.html, privacy.html, ...subPageFiles], outdir: build/, minify: true, sourcemap: linked })
phases.output: build/ directory with hashed JS/CSS bundles
phases.post: Flatten build/public/* → build/* if nested public dir exists

phases.label: Copy Root Static Assets
phases.action: fs.copyFileSync for each asset in [og-image.jpg, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, favicon.svg, apple-touch-icon.png]

phases.label: Transform for Each Provider
phases.action: for each config of PROVIDERS: createTransformer(config)(skills, DIST_DIR, opts)
phases.detail: Each provider runs twice: unprefixed and prefixed (prefix='i-', outputSuffix='-prefixed')

phases.label: Assemble Universal Directory
phases.detail: Merges all provider configDirs into dist/universal/ and dist/universal-prefixed/; writes README.txt

phases.label: Sync Skills to Repo Root (Local Testing)
phases.post: Remove deprecated skill stubs [frontend-design, teach-impeccable, arrange, normalize, onboard, extract] from all local harness dirs

phases.label: Validation Gate
actions: generateCounts(ROOT_DIR, skills, buildDir) → reads detect-antipatterns.mjs, writes public/js/generated/counts.js, validates references in HTML/MD/JSON files
validateAntipatternRules(ROOT_DIR) → cross-checks ANTIPATTERNS[].skillGuideline against impeccable SKILL.md DON'T lines
validateSiteHeader(ROOT_DIR) → checks <!-- site-header v1 --> marker in 3 HTML pages
validateNoEmDashes(ROOT_DIR) → scans content/site, public HTML, scripts for em-dash characters
phases.decision: if any of (countErrors | validationErrors | headerErrors | emDashErrors) > 0 → process.exit(1)

key_functions.build: async, top-level orchestrator, calls all phases in sequence
key_functions.generateCounts: (rootDir, skills, buildDir) → reads detect-antipatterns.mjs for rule IDs, writes counts.js, validates stale refs; returns error count
key_functions.validateAntipatternRules: (rootDir) → parses ANTIPATTERNS array, calls readPatterns(), cross-checks skillGuideline substrings; returns error count
key_functions.buildStaticSite: async (extraEntrypoints[]) → invokes Bun.build, flattens nested public/, logs sizes
key_functions.assembleUniversal: (distDir, suffix='') → merges all provider configDirs; writes README.txt
key_functions.generateApiData: (buildDir, skills, patterns) → emits static JSON for Cloudflare API routes
key_functions.validateNoEmDashes: (rootDir) → recursive file scan for em-dash patterns; returns count
key_functions.validateSiteHeader: (rootDir) → checks site-header marker; returns error count

key_variables.buildDir: ROOT_DIR/build — static site output (Bun bundle + assets + API data)
key_variables.skills: array from readSourceFiles(); includes filePath, name, description, userInvocable
key_variables.PROVIDERS: map from scripts/lib/transformers/index.js; each entry has { provider, configDir }

branching_conditions: buildStaticSite: if build/public/ exists → flatten to build/
assembleUniversal: if src dir exists → copyDirSync (else skip)
sync local: if skillsSrc exists AND skillsDest exists → rmSync then copy
validation gate: if any error count > 0 → process.exit(1)
external_dependencies: source/skills/impeccable/SKILL.md: DON'T lines for antipattern validation
important_notes: Build is async (top-level await via build()). All validation runs AFTER asset generation — a validation failure exits with code 1 but build artifacts already exist. DIST_DIR and buildDir are distinct: dist/ holds provider zip sources, build/ is the deployable static site. Provider transforms run 2x each (plain + i- prefixed). generateCounts both WRITES counts.js and VALIDATES existing references in 7 files.
